positive: A minimalist, high-contrast geometric design featuring intertwined abstract organic shapes and delicate, stylized cosmic elements. The main subject is a stylized arrangement of lunar phases orbiting a central nebula core, rendered with crisp, clean lines and bold, negative space utilization. Color palette should be limited to deep midnight blue, cosmic gold, muted teal, and stark off-white. The composition must be perfectly symmetrical and centered, maximizing visual impact as a repeatable apparel print. Use a neo-art deco style mixed with celestial patterns. Ideal for vinyl transfer or screen printing. Vector art quality, perfect symmetry, clean silhouette, solid fill.
negative: blurry, low detail, jpeg artifacts, amateur, noisy, text, watermark, signature, extra limbs, bad anatomy, messy, cluttered, low contrast, poor composition
